name: F-22 Raptor
description: The world's premier air superiority fighter combining stealth, supercruise, and integrated avionics. No longer in production, making existing airframes irreplaceable strategic assets.

specialAbilities.name: Supercruise
specialAbilities.description: Sustained supersonic flight without afterburner conserves fuel and reduces infrared signature during high-speed ingress.

specialAbilities.name: First Look, First Kill
specialAbilities.description: Superior radar and stealth combination ensures detection of enemy aircraft before being detected, granting first-strike advantage.
